calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jim Reilly, Esq. 415-939-2424 for Plaintiff and specially appearing for Defense Counsel.
No other Appearance.

Party states appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

The Court provides context re a similar motion in March; counsel in contempt for a violation of a court order; issue on proof of service; In-camera request not in motion, reads aloud paragraph 2 of the TR, states courtesy copies needed, proposed orders received prior to the hearing are not verbatim.
Mr. Reilly states he has an email exchange with Defense counsel re specially appearing for Defense today, service was proper, resubmitted proofs, Defendant served properly for this hearing, judicial council forms properly filled out, cautious of confidentiality.

Prop. order submitted prior to the hearing is rejected. Counsel to submit two proposed orders ASAP per the Court's instructions.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Before the court is an unopposed Motion to be Relieved as Counsel from Counsel Jim Reilly, counsel of record for Plaintiff Robin Robinson. The Court will take the matter under submission*** once the proposed orders are received.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs two orders. (see scanned orders for details)***

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Prior to open court, Atty. Reilly appears in the courtroom to contest the court's TR. The Court did not receive a timely notice to contest. At the instruction of the Court, the clerk informs counsel the TR will be adopted for failure to send a timely notice to contest.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Before the court is an unopposed Motion to be Relieved as Counsel from Counsel Jim Reilly, counsel of record for Plaintiff Robin Robinson. The motion is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

Moving Party has not demonstrated proper service on Plaintiff. Defendant is not named on the POS. (See California Rules of Court, rule 3.1362(d) ["The notice of motion and motion, the declaration, and the proposed order must be served on the client and on all other parties who have appeared in the case."].)

The motion is not signed. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 128.7(a) ["Every pleading, petition, written notice of motion, or other similar paper shall be signed by at least one attorney of record in the attorney's individual name, or, if the party is not represented by an attorney, shall be signed by the party. Each paper shall state the signer's address and telephone number, if any."].)

As presented, the motion is deficient on the merits, as well. "[A] breakdown in communication" is a conclusion. Conclusory statements are insufficient to support a motion to be relieved. Specific facts supporting the order need to be set out, if possible (and its most often quite possible), in the declaration. If counsel re-files their motion and seeks an in-camera hearing or intends to rely on an in-camera hearing to establish the factual basis for the motion, that must be clearly stated in the motion and/or declaration and counsel's in-person, personal attendance at the hearing on the motion will be required.

The court notes it did not receive a courtesy copy of the proposed order.

Prior to the hearing, Moving Counsel shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order repeating the above verbatim.

No proposed order received. Moving Counsel failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Moving Counsel is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2025 Set For Trial On Sep-08-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
